fields.label: base_M
fields.value: The MIDI segment contains a local D minor context and a descending A4--G4--F4--E4 top-line melody with its quarter-eighth-eighth-quarter rhythm.

fields.label: base_D
fields.value: From 3.0s to before 4.5s, correct the changed melody pitch so it fits the local D minor melody, while preserving non-target roles and all material outside the span.

fields.label: base_MD
fields.value: From 3.0s to before 4.5s, correct only the off-key top-line note so it fits the local D minor context; preserve the descending A4--G4--F4--E4 top-line melody with its quarter-eighth-eighth-quarter rhythm, keep the accompaniment and outside-span timing unchanged.

preprocess_steps.title: 5. Render Prompt Families

prompts.rendered_text: The MIDI segment contains a local D minor context and a descending A4--G4--F4--E4 top-line melody with its quarter-eighth-eighth-quarter rhythm.
From 3.0s to before 4.5s, correct the changed melody pitch so it fits the local D minor melody, while preserving non-target roles and all material outside the span.

From 3.0s to before 4.5s, correct only the off-key top-line note so it fits the local D minor context; preserve the descending A4--G4--F4--E4 top-line melody with its quarter-eighth-eighth-quarter rhythm, keep the accompaniment and outside-span timing unchanged.

cases.title: Off-key top-line repair with melody rhythm preservation

edit_plan.target_state: left-hand accompaniment onsets are closer to the local grid

fields.label: base_M
fields.value: The MIDI segment contains left-hand accompaniment against a local eighth-note grid, with the right-hand melody treated as protected material.

fields.label: base_D
fields.value: From 6.0s to before 8.5s, reduce only the left-hand onset jitter toward the validated beat grid while preserving pitch content, the right-hand melody, and all material outside the span.

fields.label: base_MD
fields.value: From 6.0s to before 8.5s, make the left hand steadier against the eighth-note grid by reducing median grid deviation from 40 ms to 0 ms, while keeping pitches and the right-hand melody unchanged.

preprocess_steps.title: 5. Render Prompt Families

prompts.rendered_text: The MIDI segment contains left-hand accompaniment against a local eighth-note grid, with the right-hand melody treated as protected material.
From 6.0s to before 8.5s, reduce only the left-hand onset jitter toward the validated beat grid while preserving pitch content, the right-hand melody, and all material outside the span.
From 6.0s to before 8.5s, make the left hand steadier against the eighth-note grid by reducing median grid deviation from 40 ms to 0 ms, while keeping pitches and the right-hand melody unchanged.

cases.title: Left-hand onset de-jittering against the beat grid

proxy.criterion: changed roles are a subset of accompaniment and melody hash is unchanged

edit_plan.source_state: the accompaniment is relatively dense under a fixed top-line melody
edit_plan.target_state: the accompaniment is lighter while the melody is unchanged

fields.label: base_M
fields.value: The MIDI segment has local G major context and arch-shaped B4--D5--E5--D5 top-line melody with its quarter-quarter-eighth-eighth rhythm over an accompaniment texture.

fields.label: base_D
fields.value: From 4.0s to before 8.0s, make only the accompaniment texture lighter according to the validated density reduction, while preserving the melody and leaving material outside the span unchanged.

fields.label: base_MD
fields.value: From 4.0s to before 8.0s, simplify only the accompaniment under the arch-shaped B4--D5--E5--D5 top-line melody with its quarter-quarter-eighth-eighth rhythm in G major, reducing density while preserving the melody's pitch and rhythm and all outside-span material.

preprocess_steps.title: 5. Render Prompt Families

prompts.rendered_text: The MIDI segment has local G major context and arch-shaped B4--D5--E5--D5 top-line melody with its quarter-quarter-eighth-eighth rhythm over an accompaniment texture.
From 4.0s to before 8.0s, make only the accompaniment texture lighter according to the validated density reduction, while preserving the melody and leaving material outside the span unchanged.

From 4.0s to before 8.0s, simplify only the accompaniment under the arch-shaped B4--D5--E5--D5 top-line melody with its quarter-quarter-eighth-eighth rhythm in G major, reducing density while preserving the melody's pitch and rhythm and all outside-span material.

cases.title: Accompaniment density reduction with fixed melody
